10 years later.. his 4th title.. at home. The GOAT
"For a long time, I have watched the rise and fall of many teams. But the player who stood at the end was always me."

From this day forward, LPL fans will wake up everyday to look back in the past and see how Faker singlehandedly stopped multiple LPL Champions to happen for he was there. And from this day forward LPL fans will hope and pray that T1 gets eliminated by LCK or not even qualify at Worlds for the nightmare they bring to LPL. Congratulations T1.

I've seen Faker play for many years now, One thing I certain is Faker get a lot more mature from when he start his career. Back in the day Faker love a good showdown, He always favor doing a solo kill than a team play. Faker now is a mature form of his old self he not waste a movement and not try to do a flashy play he used to do. He play like a big brother who support the entire team with much more calmer attitude. That some amazing character development if you ask me.
Legends never die.

T1의 팀워크.text:
The moment Keria got caught in Game 3 and the whole Squad showed up like they wanna say "You played your mind out last year and we let you down , this time we got your back" was a thing of beauty.

T1 <3
T1 Best team on the world❤❤❤
This is T1, their Grind, their Glory!

T1 have seriously played peak league of legends this whole run. I can’t remember another year I was so invested in following a team (maybe G2 in their 2019 run). Each game was so fun to watch and each and every player were so in sync. While this’ll probably be the last year this team will be together, they accomplished something unforgettable.
Legends never die... Faker and T1 were truly GODS this Worlds.
Let's go T1 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

Faker this year proves that his skill are not fading, without him his team is crumbling apart. His map awareness and shotcalls are extra ordinary. He deserves the win.
Also to his teammate Zeus, Oner, Gumayusi and keria they have a great future ahead. Their performance in this worlds2023 are on top notch and they truly learn from their mistakes.
and kudos also to Coach Tom and Coach Roach those draft is on point and kudos for them for letting the players to pick their comfort pick. They deserve it. Congrats T1

Faker career in lol is like Tom Brady career in NFL... Win it all at the early of their career, have a long period of time not win the world title and then win the world title again at the end  of their career.... Btw both of them recognize by many the goat.... Congrats for the win T1

Hate to see no one mentioning Tom here: great B/P, great game plan, willingness to trust his bot lane to go against any matchup, not funneling everything through Faker... It's still astonishing that Bengi didn't made it last year, but it's Tom who instead w/ total trust from swiss to finish.

Feel bad for WBG in this series.. Got outplayed by Yone at dragon pit in G1, TheShy made a huge mistake in G2, and then G3 is just total marco outplay - props to them on still trying to make something work in the end, instead of just slowly losing the game, but they were just way too behind.

Congratz to T1 and hope they run this roster back next year.

The level of Faker is so that the observers can't capture it. He creates so much space for his team, constantly making sure the enemy team can't really group up. Removing the enemy's advantage, making sure they can't function is so masterfully done. He was always way ahead of any competition and finally he have a team that can play around him! so good! props to all of T1 players but he is the GOAT for a reason. These 3 games is a solid proof.
